description_long: This is a mid-century modern style wooden cabinet with a rectangular shape and four angled legs. The front features two sliding doors, one on the left with a blue star and blue border, and one on the right with a red star and red border, both set against a white background. Between the doors are two open shelves, the upper one painted blue and the lower one painted red, providing additional storage or display space. The top, sides, and legs of the cabinet have a natural wood grain finish, giving it a warm and classic appearance. The back and sides are plain, with no visible hardware or decorative elements. This cabinet is suitable for use in urban environments such as living rooms, lobbies, or community spaces, offering both concealed and open storage.
description: A mid-century modern wooden cabinet with two star-decorated sliding doors and colorful open shelves, standing on four angled legs. The cabinet features a natural wood finish with blue and red accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing two sliding doors with star motifs and two open shelves in blue and red.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wood grain side panel and two angled legs.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back panel and the colored borders of the doors and shelves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain wood grain panel and two angled legs.
